email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Service Executive bij FCR Media. Uw focus op digitale oplossingen voor kmo’s en zelfstandigen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Ik help klanten hun online zichtbaarheid te verbeteren en resultaten te meten via tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data en GEO, wat steeds belangrijker wordt in digitale marketing.

Ik ben commercieel ingesteld, resultaatgericht en heb een sterke drive om klanten te adviseren en te ondersteunen. Mijn B1 Nederlands is voldoende voor professionele gesprekken, en ik volg lessen om me verder te verbeteren.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn digitale kennis en commerciële mindset in te zetten bij FCR Media. Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Service Executive position at FCR Media. Your focus on digital solutions for SMEs and self-employed professionals aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write content, and manage WordPress sites. I help clients improve their online visibility and measure results using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data and GEO, which is becoming increasingly important in digital marketing.

I have a commercial mindset, am results-driven, and have a strong drive to advise and support clients. My B1 Dutch is sufficient for professional conversations, and I am taking classes to further improve.

I look forward to applying my digital knowledge and commercial mindset at FCR Media. I would be happy to explain my motivation in a personal conversation.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor Service Executive bij FCR Media las, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw missie om kmo’s en zelfstandigen te helpen groeien via digitale marketing sluit naadloos aan bij wat ik dagelijks doe en waar ik gepassioneerd over ben.

Als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto adviseer ik klanten over hun online zichtbaarheid. Ik voer on-page SEO uit, schrijf doelgerichte blogcontent en beheer WordPress-sites van A tot Z. Daarbij gebruik ik tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Ik herken kansen en denk proactief mee – precies wat u zoekt in een Service Executive.

Wat mij onderscheidt is mijn technische basis in webontwikkeling en mijn ervaring met GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). Via mijn project mirook.com heb ik gestructureerde data, entity-optimalisatie en AI-zoekmachinezichtbaarheid toegepast. Dit is een groeiend domein dat FCR Media kan onderscheiden in de markt.

Ik ben commercieel ingesteld, resultaatgericht en heb een sterke drive om klanten te overtuigen en langdurige relaties op te bouwen. Mijn B1 Nederlands stelt me in staat om vloeiende gesprekken te voeren, en ik werk elke dag aan mijn taalvaardigheid.

FCR Media biedt een dynamische omgeving waar ik mijn digitale expertise kan combineren met commerciële groei. Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn talenten in te zetten en te ontwikkelen binnen uw team.

Ik hoop u binnenkort te ontmoeten om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

When I read the vacancy for Service Executive at FCR Media, I immediately felt a connection. Your mission to help SMEs and self-employed professionals grow through digital marketing aligns perfectly with what I do daily and what I am passionate about.

As a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I advise clients on their online visibility. I perform on-page SEO, write targeted blog content, and manage WordPress sites from A to Z. I use tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and optimize performance. I recognize opportunities and think proactively – exactly what you are looking for in a Service Executive.

What sets me apart is my technical background in web development and my experience with GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). Through my project mirook.com, I have applied structured data, entity optimization, and AI search visibility. This is a growing field that can distinguish FCR Media in the market.

I have a commercial mindset, am results-driven, and have a strong drive to convince clients and build long-term relationships. My B1 Dutch allows me to conduct fluent conversations, and I work on my language skills every day.

FCR Media offers a dynamic environment where I can combine my digital expertise with commercial growth. I am motivated to apply and develop my talents within your team.

I hope to meet you soon to further explain my motivation.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Commercieel ingesteld en resultaatgericht: adviseer klanten over digitale oplossingen en herken verkoopkansen.
Ervaring met digitale marketing: on-page SEO, contentcreatie, WordPress-beheer, en prestatiemeting via Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs.
Technische kennis van web en SEO: gestructureerde data, GEO, JSON-LD schema – relevant voor moderne digitale campagnes.
Sterke communicatieve vaardigheden: overtuigend en klantgericht, met B1 Nederlands en professioneel Engels.
Energiek en leergierig: continu bezig met bijscholing in digitale marketing en taal.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
